PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/jobs' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Output "GET /api/jobs -> $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $data = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "Jobs returned: $\($data.Count\)"; if \($data.Count -gt 0\) { Write-Output \("First: #{0} {1} | score={2} verdict={3}" -f $data[0].id, $data[0].company, $data[0].score, $data[0].verdict\) } } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Output "GET / -> $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)"; Write-Output "First 80 chars: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(80, $r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/static/app.js' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Output "GET app.js -> $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/static/style.css' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Output "GET style.css -> $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/jobs/33' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "GET /api/jobs/33 -> $\($r.StatusCode\): $\($j.company\) $\($j.title\) \(desc len: $\($j.description.Length\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell($body = @{ text = "Senior Product Manager at TestCorp`n`nResponsibilities: own the roadmap, ship fast, measure impact. 3-6 years PM experience required in fintech or payments. Location: Bangalore or Remote."; company = "TestCorp" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/ingest/text' -Method POST -Body $body -TimeoutSec 90; Write-Output \("POST /api/ingest/text -> id={0} title={1} company={2} score={3} verdict={4}" -f $r.id, $r.title, $r.company, $r.score, $r.verdict\) } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $_"; Write-Output $_.ErrorDetails })
